And Allco Finance Limited Renewed Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Continued To Jun-30-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALLCO FINANCE LIMITED'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action.

The hearing on Allco Financial Limited's "renewed motion to quash service of summons and to dismiss or stay the action" is continued to June 30, 2022 to enable jurisdictional discovery. (See, e.g., Mihlon v. Sup.Ct. (1985) 169 Cal.App. 3d 703, 710 (plaintiff's "right" to conduct such discovery).) Both parties may file 10-page briefs addressing the discovery's results on or before June 21, 2022.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: A. Datt, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
